title: Armor Trims Plus [WB]
description: you can still creative look and multiple colors
body:
![Armor trim PLUS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b0f896406fdb167515525b8ce57010c6152c2a.png)

Welcome to Armor Trim´s Plus+

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae9df7cd4d76c4661a3cdf89b63f2e36ae6ada5_0.webp)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-trim-s-plus

you can still creative look and multiple colors

16+ Trims

16+ Colors
![all armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61bced80c001496b366662b505c340b6cbcad81.png)
How can you find the gems?

whole simple

you mine the stones and deepslate

and you get the chance at stones by 23% and the dark version you get the chance at deepslate by 11%
![all stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e057fdf8e57ac8bec56640812920bb0f469e62.png)

so if you have the whole gem

It's so dirty!

 1. Gem on the main hand

2. Right-click on the water, then it will be cleaned

info:

there must be a block next to the water and right click on the block:



From now on, you have a beautiful gemstone!
![all stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35484bf4f2e538e4a97c76fa2a1e4d855f4f4e9f.png)
now you can make something beautiful

if you want to know how to make the trims?

schaue bei gallery
